subject: Your property portfolio is generating reports that nobody reads
body:
Hi [Name],

Most real estate CFOs spend 6–8 hours a month compiling performance reports from 4–5 disconnected systems. The reports are late, the data is stale, and board decisions happen on gut feel anyway.

[Product] consolidates your portfolio data into a single live dashboard — no manual exports, no version conflicts.

One client reduced monthly reporting time from 7 hours to 40 minutes and cut their external reporting consultant costs by $2,400/month.

Happy to show you a 15-minute demo with your asset classes in mind.
why_it_works: data-driven — pain quantified in hours + specific cost saving + tailored demo offer
